introductionSomali: Unit-kan waxaad ku baranaysaa sida English loogu sheego wax dhacay. Waxaad adeegsanaysaa Past Simple, regular iyo irregular verbs, did/didn’t, was/were, weedhaha waqtiga hore iyo erayada dhacdooyinka isku xira.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Waxaad baranaysaa weedhaha waqtiga dhow ee hore iyo sida falka past form loogu beddelo.
learningObjectives: Faham erayada iyo qaababka muhiimka ah ee Ka hadalka shalay.
Samee jumlado Past Simple ah oo sax ah.
Ka hadal ama ka qor dhacdo hore adigoo aan bixin xog xasaasi ah.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Weedhan waxaa loo adeegsadaa marka laga hadlayo waqti hore.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: I stayed home the day before yesterday.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Weedhan waxaa loo adeegsadaa marka laga hadlayo waqti hore.

grammar.explanationSomali: Marka dhacdo dhammaatay laga hadlayo, falka waxaa loo beddelaa past form. Weedhaha sida yesterday iyo last night waxay caddeeyaan waqtiga hore.
grammar.rule: Marka dhacdo dhammaatay laga hadlayo, falka waxaa loo beddelaa past form. Weedhaha sida yesterday iyo last night waxay caddeeyaan waqtiga hore.
grammar.sentenceStructure: Subject + past verb + past time expression.

positiveExamples.english: We visited our family last night.
I stayed home the day before yesterday.

negativeExamples.english: I didn’t work yesterday.
She wasn’t at home last night.
They didn’t go to the market.

commonMistakesSomali: Did/didn’t ka dib base verb isticmaal: Did she go? ma aha Did she went?
I/he/she/it waxaa lala isticmaalaa was; you/we/they waxaa lala isticmaalaa were.

practiceQuestions.question: “yesterday” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
practiceQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabtu waa macnaha saxda ah ee yesterday.

practiceQuestions.question: Turjun: I worked yesterday.
practiceQuestions.explanationSomali: Turjumaaddani waxay gudbinaysaa dhacdo hore.

practiceQuestions.question: Dooro jumladda Past Simple ee saxda ah.
practiceQuestions.explanationSomali: Jumladda saxda ahi waxay isticmaashaa qaabka past-ka si habboon.

practiceQuestions.question: She ___ to school yesterday.
practiceQuestions.explanationSomali: Went waa past form-ka go.

examples.english: We visited our family last night.

examples.english: Last Saturday, Sahra decided to visit her aunt in another part of the city. She woke up early, ate breakfast, and caught the bus at eight o’clock. The journey took forty minutes. When Sahra arrived, her aunt welcomed her warmly. They prepared rice and vegetables for lunch and talked about their family. After lunch, they looked at old photographs and shared funny stories. Sahra also helped her aunt clean the kitchen. Later, they drank tea in the garden. Before sunset, Sahra left the house and caught a bus home. The bus was busy, but she found a seat near the window. She arrived home at seven, called her mother, and told her about the visit. Sahra felt tired, but she was pleased because she spent a happy day with her aunt.
